<?php namespace Spatie\LaravelRay\Watchers; use Illuminate\Database\Events\QueryExecuted; use Illuminate\Support\Str; use Spatie\Ray\Settings\Settings; class UpdateQueryWatcher extends ConditionalQueryWatcher { public function register(): void { $settings = app(Settings::class); $this->enabled = $settings->send_update_queries_to_ray ?? false; $this->setConditionalCallback(function (QueryExecuted $query) { return Str::startsWith(strtolower($query->sql), 'update'); }); } }
